meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.16 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] 行右小書き (small glyph set to the line's right in vertical writing) is a forward-reference emphasis-page family (https://www.aozora.gr.jp/annotation/etc.html), particle は, single target, inline. Per §7.5 it consumes the immediately preceding target literal い (byte 3); §8 reference rendering is a side <span class="aozora-kogaki-right">. Offsets computed from the §3 byte model (keyword 行右小書き = 5 fullwidth chars = 15 bytes); cross-checked against the reference processor. New family — no prior implementation-derived draft.
